title: helichrysum appendiculatum
intro: Helichrysum appendiculatum, also known as the yellow buttons or mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. These properties contribute to various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
